title: Cardinal Health Receives Bull Notes After Activist Investor News

title: Activist investor Elliott Management discloses large stake in Cardinal Health
text: Activist investor Elliott Management has a large position in Cardinal Health Inc. and is seeking a handful of seats on the medical-products distributor's board, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Cardinal Health (CAH) Q4 Earnings Lag Estimates, Revenues Top
text: Cardinal Health's (CAH) fiscal fourth-quarter results benefit from a solid performance in the Pharmaceutical segment.

title: Cardinal Health (CAH) Lags Q4 Earnings Estimates
text: Cardinal (CAH) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -10.26% and 5.62%, respectively, for the quarter ended June 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Cardinal Health shares slump premarket after profit miss, CEO change
text: Cardinal Health Inc. shares CAH, +1.59% slumped 4.5% in premarket trade Thursday, after the drug distributor missed profit estimates for the second quarte and announced a leadership change. The company posted net income of $138 million, or 50 cent a share, for the quarter, up from $116 million, or 40 cents a share, in the year-earlier period.

title: Cardinal Health Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year Results for Fiscal Year 2022
text: Revenue increased 11% to $47.1 billion in the fourth quarter GAAP 1 operating earnings were $36 million in the fourth quarter; GAAP diluted EPS were $0.50 in the fourth quarter Non-GAAP operating earnings increased 41% to $450 million in the fourth quarter; non-GAAP diluted EPS increased 36% to $1.05 in the fourth quarter Generated operating cash flow of $3.1 billion in fiscal year 2022 Company provides fiscal year 2023 guidance and reiterates long-term targets Company introduces Medical Improvement Plan, targeting Medical segment profit of at least $650 million by fiscal year 2025 DUBLIN, Ohio , Aug. 11, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Cardinal Health (NYSE: CAH) today reported fourth quarter fiscal year 2022 revenues of $47.1 billion, an increase of 11% from the fourth quarter of last year. GAAP operating earnings were $36 million, primarily due to a non-cash, pre-tax goodwill impairment charge of $303 million in the Medical segment.

title: Cardinal Health Announces Leadership Changes
text: -- Mike Kaufmann to Step Down as Chief Executive Officer and from Board of Directors -- -- Jason Hollar, Chief Financial Officer, Named Chief Executive Officer -- -- Patricia English to Serve as Interim Chief Financial Officer -- DUBLIN, Ohio , Aug. 11, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Cardinal Health (NYSE: CAH) announced today that its Board of Directors has elected Jason Hollar as the company's next Chief Executive Officer, effective September 1, 2022.  Hollar will also join the Board of Directors effective August 11, 2022.

title: Cardinal Health Names Michelle Greene as Chief Information Officer
text: Greene previously served as SVP of EIT for the company's Pharmaceutical Segment DUBLIN, Ohio , Aug. 1, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Cardinal Health (NYSE: CAH) announced today that Michelle Greene has been named chief information officer. Greene will report to CEO, Mike Kaufmann and join the company's executive committee.
